sections.one_line: Shared Kernos instances with user trust tiers and access boundaries
User-facing web UI for chat, settings, capability management, covenant editing, and space navigation
Collision, anomaly, opportunity, and pattern detection beyond foresight signals
Routing tasks to different LLMs by complexity and cost
Guidance for agent spaces that interact with customers or clients, with disclosure and boundary management.
Stored automations that run on schedules or trigger from events
Single registry for built-in and user-added capabilities
